upright.tarot.rws.major.the_fool: A new beginning asks for trust, openness, and a free step into unknown ground.
upright.tarot.rws.major.the_magician: Will, skill, and available resources can be directed into effective action.
upright.tarot.rws.major.the_high_priestess: Hidden knowledge, intuition, and quiet discernment are stronger than surface answers.
upright.tarot.rws.major.the_empress: Growth, care, beauty, and fruitful conditions support the matter at hand.
upright.tarot.rws.major.the_emperor: Structure, authority, and disciplined leadership can stabilise the situation.
upright.tarot.rws.major.the_hierophant: Tradition, counsel, shared values, and formal bonds shape the path forward.
upright.tarot.rws.major.the_lovers: Choice, attraction, union, and values must be aligned before commitment.
upright.tarot.rws.major.the_chariot: Victory comes through direction, discipline, and command of opposing forces.
upright.tarot.rws.major.strength: Courage, patience, and gentle mastery tame pressure without violence.
upright.tarot.rws.major.the_hermit: Withdrawal, reflection, and inner guidance reveal what public noise cannot.
upright.tarot.rws.major.wheel_of_fortune: A turning point brings change, chance, and movement in the cycle of events.
upright.tarot.rws.major.justice: Fairness, truth, accountability, and right order decide the deserving outcome.
upright.tarot.rws.major.the_hanged_man: A willing pause, sacrifice, or changed perspective opens a deeper understanding.
upright.tarot.rws.major.death: An ending clears the way for transition, renewal, and necessary transformation.
upright.tarot.rws.major.temperance: Balance, moderation, and careful blending bring healing and right proportion.
upright.tarot.rws.major.the_devil: Attachment, appetite, and material bondage must be seen plainly before freedom.
upright.tarot.rws.major.the_tower: Sudden disruption breaks false structures and exposes what can no longer stand.
upright.tarot.rws.major.the_star: Hope, renewal, inspiration, and spiritual clarity return after difficulty.
upright.tarot.rws.major.the_moon: Dreams, uncertainty, and hidden influences ask for careful navigation.
upright.tarot.rws.major.the_sun: Clarity, joy, vitality, and success make the matter visible and life-giving.
upright.tarot.rws.major.judgement: Awakening, reckoning, and renewal call for honest response and liberation.
upright.tarot.rws.major.the_world: Completion, fulfilment, success, and movement into a larger whole are indicated.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.wands.ace: Creative force, enterprise, and inspiration offer the seed of growth.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.wands.two: Planning, influence, and bold assessment look beyond the current position.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.wands.three: Established effort begins to show results through foresight and cooperation.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.wands.four: Harmony, celebration, rest, and a secure milestone bring welcome relief.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.wands.five: Competition, struggle, and clashing ambitions test strength and coordination.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.wands.six: Recognition, good news, and victory follow effort and public confidence.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.wands.seven: Courage and persistence defend a hard-won position against pressure.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.wands.eight: Swift movement, messages, and decisive action accelerate events.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.wands.nine: Resilience, preparedness, and guarded strength withstand a final test.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.wands.ten: Burden, responsibility, and pressure show the cost of carrying too much.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.wands.page: A lively message, new enthusiasm, or adventurous impulse enters the matter.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.wands.knight: Energetic pursuit, travel, and bold ambition press quickly forward.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.wands.queen: Warmth, confidence, independence, and practical charm support growth.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.wands.king: Visionary leadership, honesty, and enterprise act with mature fire.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.cups.ace: Love, compassion, and emotional renewal overflow from a fresh source.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.cups.two: Mutual affection, partnership, and reconciliation create a balanced bond.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.cups.three: Friendship, celebration, community, and shared happiness are favoured.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.cups.four: Weariness, contemplation, and emotional withdrawal ask what is being refused.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.cups.five: Loss, regret, and disappointment dominate, though not everything is gone.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.cups.six: Memory, innocence, kindness, and the past offer comfort or influence.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.cups.seven: Imagination offers many choices, but fantasy must be separated from reality.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.cups.eight: A voluntary departure seeks deeper meaning beyond what once satisfied.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.cups.nine: Contentment, satisfaction, and fulfilled wishes bring emotional ease.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.cups.ten: Lasting happiness, family harmony, and emotional fulfilment are within reach.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.cups.page: A tender message, intuition, or imaginative opening invites emotional response.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.cups.knight: Romance, invitation, artistry, or a heartfelt proposal approaches.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.cups.queen: Compassion, emotional depth, and intuitive care understand what is unspoken.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.cups.king: Calm feeling, generosity, and wise emotional authority steady the situation.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.swords.ace: Clarity, truth, and decisive thought cut through confusion.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.swords.two: A guarded pause or difficult choice requires balance before action.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.swords.three: Sorrow, separation, and painful truth pierce the heart of the issue.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.swords.four: Rest, retreat, and recovery allow the mind to regain strength.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.swords.five: Conflict, defeat, and hollow victory reveal the cost of winning.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.swords.six: Transition, passage, and gradual recovery move away from difficulty.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.swords.seven: Strategy, secrecy, and partial success require careful ethics.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.swords.eight: Restriction and fear create a mental prison that may be looser than it seems.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.swords.nine: Anxiety, remorse, and sleepless thought magnify distress.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.swords.ten: A painful ending, ruin, or final blow marks the limit of the old pattern.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.swords.page: Watchfulness, curiosity, and sharp messages require alert thought.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.swords.knight: Swift argument, ambition, and forceful thought charge into action.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.swords.queen: Clear judgement, independence, and honest perception cut through pretence.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.swords.king: Authority of mind, law, strategy, and disciplined truth set the standard.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.pentacles.ace: A material opportunity, prosperity, or practical seed offers real growth.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.pentacles.two: Change, juggling, and adaptation require flexible management of resources.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.pentacles.three: Skilled work, collaboration, and planning build something of lasting value.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.pentacles.four: Security, possession, and careful control protect what has been gained.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.pentacles.five: Hardship, exclusion, and material worry ask for help and endurance.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.pentacles.six: Generosity, fair exchange, and support balance giving and receiving.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.pentacles.seven: Patience, assessment, and long labour ask whether the harvest is worth the wait.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.pentacles.eight: Apprenticeship, diligence, and steady craft improve skill through repetition.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.pentacles.nine: Self-sufficiency, refinement, and earned comfort show disciplined prosperity.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.pentacles.ten: Legacy, family wealth, and lasting stability support the wider household.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.pentacles.page: Study, practical news, and fresh ambition begin material learning.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.pentacles.knight: Reliability, patience, and methodical effort make slow progress dependable.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.pentacles.queen: Practical care, prosperity, and grounded generosity nourish real life.
upright.tarot.rws.minor.pentacles.king: Mature success, stewardship, and practical authority provide dependable abundance.

reversed.tarot.rws.major.the_fool: Impulsiveness, folly, or poor preparation may turn freedom into avoidable risk.
reversed.tarot.rws.major.the_magician: Talent is scattered or misused; manipulation, delay, or poor focus weakens the result.
reversed.tarot.rws.major.the_high_priestess: Concealment, silence, or ignored intuition obscures what needs to be understood.
reversed.tarot.rws.major.the_empress: Dependence, vanity, delay, or blocked growth disturbs natural development.
reversed.tarot.rws.major.the_emperor: Rigidity, domination, or weak governance undermines order and trust.
reversed.tarot.rws.major.the_hierophant: Conformity, weakness, or dependence on social approval may limit truth.
reversed.tarot.rws.major.the_lovers: Disharmony, temptation, or divided desire makes commitment unstable.
reversed.tarot.rws.major.the_chariot: Loss of control, dispute, or aggression may turn momentum against itself.
reversed.tarot.rws.major.strength: Fear, weakness, or misuse of force shows strength separated from wisdom.
reversed.tarot.rws.major.the_hermit: Isolation, concealment, or mistrust may become avoidance rather than wisdom.
reversed.tarot.rws.major.wheel_of_fortune: Instability, resistance, or a difficult turn exposes dependence on circumstance.
reversed.tarot.rws.major.justice: Bias, legal complication, or excessive severity distorts fair judgement.
reversed.tarot.rws.major.the_hanged_man: Stagnation, needless sacrifice, or refusal to release keeps the issue suspended.
reversed.tarot.rws.major.death: Resistance to closure prolongs decay, inertia, or fear of change.
reversed.tarot.rws.major.temperance: Excess, discord, or poor timing prevents elements from working together.
reversed.tarot.rws.major.the_devil: Release is possible, but fear, obsession, or false dependence may still linger.
reversed.tarot.rws.major.the_tower: A crisis may be delayed, resisted, or internalised rather than openly faced.
reversed.tarot.rws.major.the_star: Discouragement, doubt, or lost direction clouds the promise of renewal.
reversed.tarot.rws.major.the_moon: Confusion starts to lift, but deception or anxiety may still distort judgement.
reversed.tarot.rws.major.the_sun: Happiness is reduced by delay, overconfidence, or a partial success.
reversed.tarot.rws.major.judgement: Self-doubt, denial, or fear of judgement delays the needed transformation.
reversed.tarot.rws.major.the_world: Inertia, stagnation, or unfinished work prevents full completion.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.wands.ace: A false start, delay, or misdirected impulse weakens the new venture.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.wands.two: Restlessness, fear, or surprise disrupts confidence in the next step.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.wands.three: Delay, pride, or poor support complicates expected progress.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.wands.four: The same promise remains, but peace or completion may be postponed.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.wands.five: Conflict may turn to trickery, avoidance, or unresolved tension.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.wands.six: Pride, delay, or fear of failure weakens the expected triumph.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.wands.seven: Embarrassment, hesitation, or overwhelm threatens the defended ground.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.wands.eight: Delay, dispute, or misdirected haste interrupts momentum.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.wands.nine: Suspicion, exhaustion, or defensive rigidity drains strength.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.wands.ten: Oppression, overextension, or release of a load changes the obligation.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.wands.page: Unreliable news, immaturity, or scattered desire makes action premature.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.wands.knight: Haste, disruption, or impulsive departure creates instability.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.wands.queen: Jealousy, temper, or domination distorts creative confidence.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.wands.king: Severity, intolerance, or impulsive command misuses authority.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.cups.ace: Emotional blockage, instability, or withheld affection dries the source.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.cups.two: Disharmony, separation, or unequal feeling strains the bond.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.cups.three: Excess, gossip, or superficial pleasure weakens genuine connection.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.cups.four: New interest returns as old dissatisfaction begins to loosen.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.cups.five: Recovery, forgiveness, or return begins after sorrow.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.cups.six: Clinging to the past or idealising it prevents mature response.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.cups.seven: Clarity, decision, or narrowed desire cuts through illusion.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.cups.eight: Fear of leaving, drifting, or returning to an empty pattern delays growth.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.cups.nine: Complacency, excess, or hollow satisfaction exposes what pleasure cannot solve.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.cups.ten: Domestic tension, false harmony, or private disappointment troubles peace.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.cups.page: Emotional immaturity, fantasy, or unreliable feeling clouds the message.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.cups.knight: Seduction, moodiness, or unrealistic charm may mislead.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.cups.queen: Emotional overwhelm, dependence, or secrecy distorts sensitivity.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.cups.king: Manipulation, volatility, or indulgence corrupts emotional authority.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.swords.ace: Confusion, harsh words, or misused intellect turns the blade against the matter.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.swords.two: Indecision breaks down, but confusion or disclosure may be uncomfortable.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.swords.three: Recovery begins, though grief or resentment may still need release.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.swords.four: Restlessness, burnout, or forced return interrupts necessary recovery.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.swords.five: Reconciliation is possible, but resentment or shame may remain.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.swords.six: Resistance to movement or unresolved trouble delays safe passage.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.swords.seven: Exposure, confession, or poor planning reveals what was hidden.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.swords.eight: Release, new perspective, or acceptance begins to loosen constraint.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.swords.nine: Hope returns slowly as guilt, fear, or despair is confronted.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.swords.ten: The worst has passed, but recovery may be slow and difficult.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.swords.page: Spying, gossip, or rash words turn intelligence into trouble.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.swords.knight: Recklessness, aggression, or scattered thought causes damage.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.swords.queen: Bitterness, coldness, or severe criticism hardens clear judgement.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.swords.king: Cruelty, manipulation, or rigid judgement misuses intellectual power.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.pentacles.ace: Lost opportunity, greed, or poor planning blocks material promise.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.pentacles.two: Disorder, overextension, or poor prioritisation makes balance unstable.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.pentacles.three: Mediocrity, poor teamwork, or lack of preparation weakens the work.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.pentacles.four: Greed, fear of loss, or rigidity turns security into restriction.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.pentacles.five: Recovery, assistance, or renewed hope begins to ease lack.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.pentacles.six: Debt, strings attached, or unequal exchange distorts generosity.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.pentacles.seven: Impatience, poor return, or wasted effort challenges the investment.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.pentacles.eight: Carelessness, monotony, or lack of focus lowers the quality of work.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.pentacles.nine: Dependence, overinvestment in appearances, or insecurity troubles comfort.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.pentacles.ten: Family tension, unstable inheritance, or short-term thinking weakens security.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.pentacles.page: Poor follow-through, laziness, or impractical planning delays progress.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.pentacles.knight: Stubbornness, stagnation, or dull routine blocks useful movement.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.pentacles.queen: Possessiveness, dependence, or material anxiety disturbs grounded care.
reversed.tarot.rws.minor.pentacles.king: Greed, rigidity, or misuse of resources turns stability into control.
